/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/oj_app.dir/src/admin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oj_app.dir/src/admin_view.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oj_app.dir/src/ai_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oj_app.dir/src/app_context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oj_app.dir/src/container_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oj_app.dir/src/db_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oj_app.dir/src/judge_core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oj_app.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oj_app.dir/src/sandbox_container.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oj_app.dir/src/user.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oj_app.dir/src/user_view.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oj_app.dir/src/view_manager.cpp.o -o oj_app  -lmysqlclient /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
